list.name: Changes
list.comment: Add image preprocessing and YOLO model inference for object detection

task.summary:
Add linear regression script and movies dataset
This commit includes a linear regression analysis script (`linear_regression.py`) covering exploratory data analysis, model training, and performance evaluation. It also adds the `movies.csv` dataset used in the analysis
Refactor linear_regression.py: update comments and outputs

Add implementations and data for various ML classifiers
Added new files for Complement Naive Bayes, RBF classifier, and Kernel SVM implementations, along with corresponding datasets (social network, spam, credit card). Included pre-processing, training, evaluation metrics, and visualization in each implementation.

Add AdaBoost implementation and update project structure
Introduced a new AdaBoost classifier script and added a README with setup instructions. Updated `.gitignore` to include excluded files and archived the `creditcard.tar.xz` dataset. Adjusted project files for better organization and task tracking.

Add spam classification enhancements and heart dataset
Enhanced the spam classification project with improved comments, visualizations (confusion matrix, ROC curve), and metrics evaluation for the Complement Naive Bayes model. Additionally, introduced the "heart.csv" dataset for potential use in heart disease prediction.
Add new classification notebook implementations for CART, AdaBoost, and Naive Bayes
Refactor AdaBoost pipeline for streamlined functionality
Implement clustering algorithms (K-Means, DBSCAN, GMM, Agglomerative) with detailed analysis and visualization. Enhanced dendrogram readability.
Implement clustering algorithms (K-Means, DBSCAN, GMM, Agglomerative) with detailed analysis and visualization. Enhanced dendrogram readability.
Clustering Algorithms in Unsupervised Machine Learning
Added neural network model for customer churn prediction: preprocessing, visualization, training, and evaluation
Add image preprocessing and YOLO model inference for object detection

MESSAGE.value:
Add linear regression script and movies dataset
This commit includes a linear regression analysis script (`linear_regression.py`) covering exploratory data analysis, model training, and performance evaluation. It also adds the `movies.csv` dataset used in the analysis
Refactor linear_regression.py: update comments and outputs

Add implementations and data for various ML classifiers
Added new files for Complement Naive Bayes, RBF classifier, and Kernel SVM implementations, along with corresponding datasets (social network, spam, credit card). Included pre-processing, training, evaluation metrics, and visualization in each implementation.

Add AdaBoost implementation and update project structure
Introduced a new AdaBoost classifier script and added a README with setup instructions. Updated `.gitignore` to include excluded files and archived the `creditcard.tar.xz` dataset. Adjusted project files for better organization and task tracking.

Add spam classification enhancements and heart dataset
Enhanced the spam classification project with improved comments, visualizations (confusion matrix, ROC curve), and metrics evaluation for the Complement Naive Bayes model. Additionally, introduced the "heart.csv" dataset for potential use in heart disease prediction.
Add new classification notebook implementations for CART, AdaBoost, and Naive Bayes
Refactor AdaBoost pipeline for streamlined functionality
Implement clustering algorithms (K-Means, DBSCAN, GMM, Agglomerative) with detailed analysis and visualization. Enhanced dendrogram readability.
Clustering Algorithms in Unsupervised Machine Learning
Added neural network model for customer churn prediction: preprocessing, visualization, training, and evaluation
Add image preprocessing and YOLO model inference for object detection

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add image preprocessing and YOLO model inference for object detection
